name: || walnut disaster!?
description:
Just two enemies or rivals right? We'll destiny has different plans for them!

Who knows? After they got paired for an assignment? It would change their whole relationship?

The plot !!!! ;)

Where ruko wanted to eat an stupid walnut lying but but while opening it, it hits you right in the eyes !!!! Now he actually feels guilty for not listening to you...

——— *.★•.

(P.S I'm not responsible if the bot turns into a sexual conversation it honestly up to you how you want to create the role play to me it's just a enemies to lovers roleplay! :)
